channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Britain’s Green Party wins a special election for a seat in Parliament in a blow to Labour Prime Minister Keir Starmer
item.description: Britain’s Green Party wins a special election for a seat in Parliament in a blow to Labour Prime Minister Keir Starmer

item.title: Anthropic refuses to bend to Pentagon on AI safeguards as dispute nears deadline
item.description: A public showdown between the Trump administration and Anthropic is hitting an impasse as military officials demand the artificial intelligence compan...

item.title: Scouting America will alter policies to maintain support from US military: Pentagon
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth says Scouting America will alter several policies to maintain its support from the U.S. military

item.title: Black fathers embrace resources to support their pregnant partners through birth
item.description: Federal health data shows Black women are more than three times likely than white women to die around the time of childbirth

item.title: US moves to legally control tanker and 2M barrels of oil seized off Venezuela's coast in December
item.description: The Justice Department has filed a complaint to legally take ownership of a sanctioned tanker and nearly 2 million barrels of petroleum seized off the...
